description: CompositionRoyal blue high neck sweater made of 100% knit cotton, has a quarter length zipper, bold stripes on the inside of the high collar and embroidered logo on the left chestFittingRegularWash careMachine wash warm on gentle cycleUse only non-chlorine bleach if neededTumble dry low on gentle cycleIron if desiredThe timberland Ribbed Quarter-Zip Sweater is great for everyday wear it's easily dressed up with khakis and boots for dinner and drinks out, and can be thrown on over jeans and a tee when you're out.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in sweatersHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
